posts.author: Vishal11
posts.community: EMS Limited - Tapping in the growth in the water management space
posts.text: There are so many corporate governance issues with company many things have been already mentioned by others and I would also like to add few more which others missed : 1st CFO resigned and MD himself becomes CFO of the company. Ok if someone gives argument of why MD can’t be CFO I would say they can be but not in this case where MD has done Civil Engineering and then MBA in International Business. 2nd The Auditor resigned stating “ pre-occupation in other assignments “ basically due to workload in August 2025 and now appointed back as Strategic Financial Consultant in May 2026 Adding to all t…
